titleStmt.title: SII 4.254: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri

No. 254. (A.R. No. 25 of 1889). ON A STONE IN FRONT OF THE KRISHNASVAMIN TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.At the top are cut the following figures:—the sun, the chakra, the Vaishṇava Teṅgalai mark, the sañkha and crescent in a line and below these a cow and calf.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
The lines of the inscription begin with a circle resembling ananusvāra. śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē [. 1*]
navanīradanīlāya javanītanatārtayē . Avanīkamanīyāya navanītamuṣē namaḥ [. 2*] kāṁcīśrīśailaśōṇāca
lakanakasabhāvēṁkaṭādripramukhyēṣvāvartyāvartya sarvēṣvatanuta vidhivat śrēyasē bhūyasēyaḥ . dēvasthā
nēṣu tīrthēṣvapi kanakatulāpūruṣādīni nānādānānyēvōpadānairapi samamakhiḷairāgamōktāni tāni [. 3*] rō
ṣakrutapratipārthivadaṁḍaḥ śēṣabhujakṣitirakṣaṇaśauṁḍaḥ . bhāṣigetappuvarāyaragaṁ
ḍastōṣakṛdarthiṣu yō raṇacaṁḍaḥ [. 4*] rājādhirāja Ityuktō yō rājaparamēśvaraḥ . mūṟurāya
ragaṁḍaśca pararāyabhayaṁkaraḥ [. 5*] hiṁdūrāyasuratrāṇō duṣṭaśārdūlamardanaḥ . gajau
ghagaṁḍabhēruṁḍa Ityādibirudānvitaḥ [. 6*] Ālōkaya mahārāja jaya jīvēti vādibhi[ḥ .]
Aṁgavaṁgakaḷiṁgādyairājabhiḥ sēvyatēca yaḥ [. 7*] stutyaudāryyaḥ sudhībhiḥ sa vijayana
garē ratnasiṁhvāsanasthaḥ kṣmāpālān kṛṣṇarāyakṣitipatiradharīkṛtyanityaṁRead nītyā.nṛgādīn . Ā pūrvā
drērathāstakṣitidharakaṭakādā ca hēmācalāṁtādāsētōrarthisārthaśriyamiha bahaḷīkṛtya kī
rtyā samiṁdhē [. 8*] sōyaṁ śrīvarakṛṣṇarāyanṛpatirjitvōdayādriṁ tataḥ kṛṣṇaṁ dēvamupāya
taḥ svanagarīṁ nītvā maṇīmaṁṭapē . śālīyābdarasāgnivēdavidhuyugbhāvē tapasyē sitē kārtiyyē divasē vri
ṣēpi vithivatkṟuṣṇapratiṣṭāṁ vyadhāt [. 9*] svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣa
1435 saṁdu mēle naḍava bhāvasaṁvatsarada phālguna śu 3 śukra lū śrīmanmahā
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrakṛṣṇarāyamahārāya
ru Udayagiriyiṁda bijemāḍisikoṁḍu baṁdaṁthā śrībālakṛṣṇadēvara pra
tiṣṭheya māḍi Āpratiṣṭhākāladali kṛṣṇadēvarige navaratnakhacita nānāvidha Ābhara
ṇagaḷanū suvarnarajatādyupakaraṇagaḷanū samarpisi dēvaraśrīkāryyake dīpā
rādhane phalāpūpādinityanaivēdyagaḷige naimittikapaṁcaparvarathamahōtsavabrā
hmaṇaviniyōga Aṁgaraṁgavaibhōgamodalāda viniyōgagaḷigāgi tatkāladalli
sarvamānyavāgi samarpisida grāmagaḷu Attivaṭeya grāma 1 hosaŪra māga
ṇege saluva mudalāpurada grāma 1 kaṁpileya māgaṇige saluva dēvalāpura
da grāma 1 keḷasāpurake saluva hariyasamudra 1 togalugallu 1 bādanahaṭi 1
tekkalakōṭege saluva rudrapādada grāma 1 kṛṣṇāpurada staḷasuṁka modalāgi sama
rpisi Ī grāmagaḷavoḷage viniyōgada brāhmarugaḷige sarvamā(ṁ)nyavāgi koṭa
gadeya sthaḷavivarā Ācāryyatvake [.] gautamagōtrada vaikhānasasūtrada yajuḥśākhe
ya tiṁmaṇācāryyara makkaḷu rāmaṇācāryyarige gautamagōtrada vai
khānasasūtrada yajuḥśākheya muḷuvāgila raṁgayagaḷa makkaḷu tiṁmaṇā
cāryyarigeŪ UbhayakeU Attivaṭelū gade kha 1 mudalāpuradalū gade
kha 1 dēvalāpuradalu gade kha 1 Ā gadde kha 3 brahmatvake . jāmadagñā
vatsagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada naṁjināthabhaṭṭara makkaḷu raṁganāthadīkṣi
tarige muddalāpuradali naraharigadde kha . 0 sadasyaru . rēbhakāśyapagōtrada Āśvalāya
nasūtrada Iṁmaḍibhaṭṭara makkaḷu śivādīkṣitarige mudalāpuradali gade kha . 0
vēdapārāyaṇake . haritagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada terakaṇaṁbiya virupā
kṣabhaṭṭara makkaḷu narasiṁhadīkṣitarige Attivaṭelu dāsarinallanagadde kha . 0 rugvēda gau
tamagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada naraharibhaṭṭara makkaḷu bhānubhaṭarige muddalāpura
dalli kabilamuddanagadde kha . 0 yajurvēda . bhāradvājagōtrada Āpastaṁbasūtrada
krāmitara nānadēvabhaṭara makkaḷu virupākṣabhaṭarige Attivaṭelu brahmadēvavīra
nagade kha . 3 haḷagadde Þ2 Ubhayagade kha . 0 gārgyagōtrada Āpastaṁbasūtrada Aṁ
ṇaṁbhaṭara makkaḷu liṁgaṁbhaṭṭarige mudalāpuradalū tūbinamalligegade kha [.] 0
sāmavēda . vasiṣṭagōtrada drāhyāyaṇasūtrada nārasiṁhyabhaṭara makkaḷu nārasiṁha
bhaṭarige Attivaṭe kha . 1The rest of the4 which is again followed by a blank space for about five letters.4
śāṁḍilagōtrada drāhyāyaṇasūtrada mādhavapaṭaṇa yēḷēśvarabhaṭara makaḷu vā
gade kha . 0 siriyagoṁḍanagade kha . 0 Ubhayaṁ
dēvasāṁprati . rugvēda . viśvāmitragōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada
yasacina siṁgaṁbhaṭara makaḷu nāgadēvabhaṭarige Attivaṭeya
lu kuṇiyagade kha . 0 viśvāmitragōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtra
bhaṭara makaḷu dēvaṇabhaṭarige mudalāpuradalu herigade kha . 0 Ā
gade nāghaṁḍugade . pavamānābhiṣēkakke . vasiṣṭagōtrada
Āśvalāyana gōtrada naraharibhaṭṭara makkaḷu nārasiṁhabhaṭarige mu
ddalāpurada gade kha [.] 0 haritagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada mānale
ya viṣṇubhaṭara makkaḷu rāmadēvabhaṭarige Ativaṭeyali duṁḍamallinā
yakana gade kha . 4 [Upi]namōḷeya cauḍagoṁḍanagaddeyalli gade Þ1 U
bhayaṁ gade kha . 0 kauśikagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada vīravelli(mā)
mādhavabhaṭara makkaḷu muṁmaḍibhaṭarige muddalāpuradalu tipiṟiḍḍi
ya jauginali gade kha . 0 viśvāmitragōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada kaṁtriḷike tiru
malabhaṭara makkaḷu kōnēribhaṭarige muddalāpuradalu ciṭāparvatana gade kha . 0
Ātrēyagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada tātājōyisara makkaḷu vellaṁbhaṭṭarige Ā
ttivaṭelu rāIgoṁḍanaḍoṇeya gadde kha [. 0] kāśyapagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada ta
ṭinasiddhibhaṭara makkaḷu dēvaṇabhaṭṭarige Āttivaṭelu parvayana Aṟigade kha . 0
kāśyapagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada kakkālaliṁgābhaṭara makkaḷu śaṁkarabhaṭarige mu
ddalāpuradalu rāmanāthana haḷadaligade kha . 0 bhāradvājagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada maṇi
vālada AUbhaḷabhaṭṭara makkaḷu AUbhaḷabhaṭarige Āttivaṭelu mōṭerāmarasana gade kha . 3
pedetiṁmayana gade Þ2 Ubhayaṁ gade kha . 0 śrīvatsagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada Āneguṁdi
cauḍibhaṭara makkaḷu kanakābhaṭarige Attivaṭeyalu viṭhalanagadde Eregade saha gade kha . 0 vasiṣṭa
gōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada haribhaṭara makaḷu reṁmaṇabhaṭarige Āttivaṭelu kuṁ
bāṟanagade ḍoṇeyamudāyagade saha gade kha . 0 mōnabhārgavagōtrada Āśvalāya
nasūtrada kaviligeviṣṇubhaṭara makaḷu rāmābhaṭarige mudalāpuradalu lakastevaḷa ligade kha . 0
bhāradvājagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada maṇiŪra raṁgubhaṭara makkaḷu tirumalabhaṭari
ge muddalāpuradaluBetween lu and ga, there is an unwritten space for about five letters.gade kha . 0 Ā pavamānābhiṣēkada jana haṁ
naraḍake gadde Āṟu khaṁḍuga . purāṇake . vasiṣṭagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada Āragaḍa viṣṇu
bhaṭṭarā makkaḷu haṁpaṇabhaṭarige Attivaṭelu bēvinamōḷeya cauḍagoṁḍanagade kha . 0
mōnabhārgavasagōtrada kātyāyanasūtrada mādhyaṁdinaśākheya Āneguṁdiya sō
manāthabhaṭara makkaḷu nārasiṁhabhaṭarige Attivaṭelu lakumanagade kalkoḷaga
ṇa vīsa saha gadde [kha . 2] . haraḷagade Þ . Ubhayaṁgade kha . 0 Ubhayaṁ purā
ṇada jana Eraḍake khaṁḍuga 1 jyōtiṣakke . Ātrēyagōtrada Āśvalāyana
sūtrada gaurājōIsara makkaḷu tippājōIsarige muddalāpurada
lu benakanagade kha . hattukoḷaga . ghaḷiyārakke . kāśyapagōtrada Āśvalā
yanasūtrada cāpaṭagauḷi ciṭṭibhaṭara makkaḷu nārasiṁhvajōIsarige mu
ddalāpuradalu nāgōjanagade kha . 0 hattukoḷaga . maṁtrapuṣpakke . kauṁ
ḍinyagōtrada Āpastaṁbasūtrada vēdagirisōmayājigaḷa makaḷu Ellaṁ
bhaṭarige muddalāpuradalu moḷeyajauginagade kha . 0 haritagōtrada Āpa
staṁbasūtrada kaṁdanavoḷala yaṟaṁbhaṭara makkaḷu Itihāsada tiru
malabhaṭṭarige Āttivaṭelu hirimahadēvacikkamahadēvana haḷada gadde
kha . 0 muddalāpuradalu kapilamuddana gade kha . 0 Ubhayaṁ gade kha . 0
vasiṣṭhagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada dēvōttamabhaṭara makaḷu siṁgiribhaṭa
rige mudalāpura(dalāpura)dalu gutugegade kha . 0 Ātrēyagōtrada Āśvalā
yanasūtrada gōpināthabhaṭara makaḷu ceṁnibhaṭarige muddalāpurada
lu guttagegade kha . 0 Ā maṁtrapuṣpada jana nālkake gade khaṁḍugada ha
dinaidu koḷaga . vidvā(ṁ)ngaḷu . Ātrēyagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada
hōbaṇabhaṭara makkaḷu vāsudēvācāryyarige mūdalāpuradalu karu
vamāṁnada gade Þ2 . [Atri]vaṭelu maṁgiseṭigade Þ3 dēvalāpuradalu ga
de kha [. 0] Ā gade kha . 0 prathamātrigōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada [Ā]
ryyasidhanāthabhaṭara makkaḷu kṛṣṇabhaṭarige Attivaṭelu teṁkaṇabayala
keḷagaṇakāluveya gade Þ4 mudalāpuradalu karuvamā(ṁ)nyada vaginagade Þ3
dēvalāpuradalu gade Þ3 Ā gade kha . 0 Ubhayaṁ vidvā(ṁ)ngaḷa jana yera
ḍakke gade khaṁḍuga . nityadānakke . bhāradvājagōtrada Āpastaṁbasūtra
da brahmagñāni naraharibhaṭara makkaḷu kanakābhaṭarigeThe rest of this line and the beginning of the next up to the letterdē are left unwritten.
dēvarige haṁpeya tērabīdiya
ṭṭeya nālkubāgila tirumaladēvara Amṛtapaḍige Atti
ḷagoṁḍanu māḍuva gade Þ3 mūgaḷa Agastyagō
trada Āśvalāyanasūtrada
na saṁprati 1 kaUṁḍi(ṁ)nyavasiṣṭa[gōtrada Ā]śvalāyanasūtrada vāra
ṇāsiya muṁmarasara makaḷu ge saṁprati 1 Ubhayaṁ
staḷasēnabōkaya saṁprati Eraḍu saṁprati 1 kaṁ stānadalū salūdu
jīvitagaThe rest of this line is left blank.
nāmatrayastōtra . haritagōtrada Āpastaṁbhasūtrada siṁgiribha
ṭara makaḷu tirumalabhaṭṭarige Attivaṭelu ceḷahāḍastaḷada
lu gade kha . 2 maṁgiseṭistaḷa Þ3 Ubhayaṁ gade hattukoḷaga bā
danahaṭilu Ereholanu kha . 0 AIguḷa .
Digital edition of SII 4.254 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
